---
pagetitle: "About — Yash Tiwari"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     NAVBAR
     EDIT NAV LINKS HERE if you rename pages.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<header class="navbar">
  <a href="index.html" class="nav-logo">YT.</a>

  <nav class="nav-links">
    <a href="index.html"    class="nav-link">Home</a>
    <a href="projects.html" class="nav-link">Projects</a>
    <a href="resume.html"   class="nav-link">Resume</a>
    <a href="about.html"    class="nav-link">About</a>
  </nav>

  <div class="nav-right">
    <a href="https://github.com/rsm-ytiwari" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="nav-icon" aria-label="GitHub">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M9 19c-5 1.5-5-2.5-7-3m14 6v-3.87a3.37 3.37 0 0 0-.94-2.61c3.14-.35 6.44-1.54 6.44-7A5.44 5.44 0 0 0 20 4.77 5.07 5.07 0 0 0 19.91 1S18.73.65 16 2.48a13.38 13.38 0 0 0-7 0C6.27.65 5.09 1 5.09 1A5.07 5.07 0 0 0 5 4.77a5.44 5.44 0 0 0-1.5 3.78c0 5.42 3.3 6.61 6.44 7A3.37 3.37 0 0 0 9 18.13V22"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yash-tiwari-here/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="nav-icon" aria-label="LinkedIn">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2 2 2 0 0 0-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6z"/>
        <rect x="2" y="9" width="4" height="12"/><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="2"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
    <button class="nav-icon" aria-label="Search">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/>
      </svg>
    </button>
    <button class="theme-pill" id="theme-toggle" aria-label="Toggle theme">
      <span id="theme-icon">
        <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/>
        </svg>
      </span>
      <span id="theme-label">Dark</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</header>


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     ABOUT SECTION
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="about-section">
  <div class="about-grid">

    <!-- LEFT — PHOTO ─────────────────────────────────────────
         EDIT PHOTO: Place your photo at assets/profile.jpg
         then uncomment the <img> and remove the placeholder div.
    ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

  
    <img src="assets/profile.jpg" alt="Yash Tiwari" class="about-photo">


    <!-- Remove this placeholder once you add profile.jpg
    <div class="about-photo-placeholder">
      Add photo →<br>assets/profile.jpg
    </div> -->

    <!-- RIGHT — BIO + SECTIONS ───────────────────────────── -->
    <div>

      <!-- ── EDIT NAME & TAGLINE HERE ── -->
      <h1 class="about-name">Yash Tiwari</h1>
      <p class="about-tagline">
        MS Business Analytics · UC San Diego · San Diego, CA
      </p>

      <!-- ── EDIT BIO HERE ────────────────────────────────── -->
      <p class="about-bio">
        Master's student in Business Analytics at UC San Diego with strong
        experience in machine learning, data analysis, and product analytics.
        Proven ability to drive measurable business impact through
        data-driven decision-making, automation, and experimentation.
        <br><br>
        Two startups. ML pipelines ranked #1 out of 60 teams. Defense UX
        shipped to the Indian Navy. I sit at the intersection of engineering,
        business, and design — and I work best when something real needs to ship.
      </p>
      <!-- ── END BIO ── -->


      <!-- ── EDUCATION ─────────────────────────────────────
           EDIT EDUCATION HERE — update school, degree, year, GPA.
      ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
      <div class="section-title">Education</div>

      <div class="edu-item">
        <div class="edu-school">University of California, San Diego</div>
        <div class="edu-degree">Master of Science in Business Analytics — Rady School of Management</div>
        <div class="edu-meta">Expected Dec 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; GPA 3.93 &nbsp;·&nbsp; San Diego, CA</div>
        <div class="edu-meta" style="margin-top:6px; font-size:11px">
          Coursework: Business Analytics · Collecting &amp; Analyzing Large Datasets · Statistical Modelling
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="edu-item">
        <div class="edu-school">National Institute of Technology, Srinagar</div>
        <div class="edu-degree">Bachelor of Technology in Mechanical Engineering</div>
        <div class="edu-meta">Jun 2025 &nbsp;·&nbsp; GPA 3.89 &nbsp;·&nbsp; India</div>
        <div class="edu-meta" style="margin-top:6px; font-size:11px">
          Awards: 2× First Runner-up, All India UX/UI Case Competition
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- ── END EDUCATION ── -->


      <!-- ── EXPERIENCE ────────────────────────────────────
           EDIT EXPERIENCE HERE — each .timeline-item is one role.
           Duplicate a block to add a new role.
      ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
      <div class="section-title" style="margin-top:40px">Experience</div>

      <div class="timeline">

        <!-- Role 1 — EDIT HERE -->
        <div class="timeline-item">
          <div class="timeline-role">Product Analyst (Full-time Intern, CEO's Office)</div>
          <div class="timeline-company">Intellsys.ai, GrowthJockey — India</div>
          <div class="timeline-period">Jan 2025 – Jun 2025</div>
          <ul class="timeline-bullets">
            <li>Built automated n8n + Python pipelines processing 100K+ records/day from structured and unstructured data sources, reducing acquisition costs by $100K+.</li>
            <li>Conducted statistical analysis and A/B tests across 1M+ recipients, improving engagement by 30%.</li>
            <li>Analyzed website traffic, funnel drop-offs, and behavioral cohorts using Google Analytics, Excel, and Tableau to generate data-backed recommendations.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <!-- End Role 1 -->

        <!-- Role 2 — EDIT HERE -->
        <div class="timeline-item">
          <div class="timeline-role">User Experience Designer Intern</div>
          <div class="timeline-company">BotLab Dynamics Pvt. Ltd. — New Delhi, India</div>
          <div class="timeline-period">Dec 2023 – Dec 2024</div>
          <ul class="timeline-bullets">
            <li>Led end-to-end design of a data-driven GCS app for the Indian Navy iDEX initiative, reducing operator task time by ~25%.</li>
            <li>Delivered 50+ screens and supported full product lifecycle including requirements gathering and design-to-development handoff.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <!-- End Role 2 -->

        <!-- Role 3 — EDIT HERE -->
        <div class="timeline-item">
          <div class="timeline-role">Co-founder &amp; CEO</div>
          <div class="timeline-company">Traway &amp; TheLoudKitchens — Srinagar</div>
          <div class="timeline-period">Dec 2022 – Jul 2024</div>
          <ul class="timeline-bullets">
            <li>Built and scaled 2 student-led ventures; led 10+ cross-functional members and executed 175+ events.</li>
            <li>Applied segmentation, pricing, and cohort analysis on 3,000+ customers, improving retention to 60%+.</li>
            <li>Achieved 3× increase in AOV for TheLoudKitchens and improved retention for Traway.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <!-- End Role 3 -->

        <!-- ── ADD NEW ROLES ABOVE THIS LINE ──
             Duplicate a .timeline-item block from above.       -->

      </div><!-- /timeline -->
      <!-- ── END EXPERIENCE ── -->


      <!-- ── SKILLS ─────────────────────────────────────────
           EDIT SKILLS HERE — add/remove .skill-tag items.
           Add a new .skill-group block to create a new category.
      ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
      <div class="section-title">Skills</div>

      <div class="skills-grid">

        <!-- Category 1 — EDIT HERE -->
        <div class="skill-group">
          <div class="skill-group-title">Programming &amp; ML</div>
          <div class="skill-tags">
            <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">SQL</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">R</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Pandas</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Polars</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Scikit-learn</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">PyTorch</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">XGBoost</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">GLM</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Random Forest</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Uplift Modeling</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Category 2 — EDIT HERE -->
        <div class="skill-group">
          <div class="skill-group-title">Analytics &amp; Experimentation</div>
          <div class="skill-tags">
            <span class="skill-tag">A/B Testing</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">EDA</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Statistical Testing</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Data Mining</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Root Cause Analysis</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">ROI Analysis</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Feature Engineering</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Category 3 — EDIT HERE -->
        <div class="skill-group">
          <div class="skill-group-title">Big Data &amp; Cloud</div>
          <div class="skill-tags">
            <span class="skill-tag">Snowflake</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">PySpark</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Hadoop</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Tableau</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Google Analytics</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Category 4 — EDIT HERE -->
        <div class="skill-group">
          <div class="skill-group-title">Automation &amp; Tools</div>
          <div class="skill-tags">
            <span class="skill-tag">n8n</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Zapier</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Make</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">OpenAI API</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">FastAPI</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Streamlit</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Git</span>
            <span class="skill-tag">Vim / NeoVim</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div><!-- /skills-grid -->
      <!-- ── END SKILLS ── -->

    </div><!-- /right column -->
  </div><!-- /about-grid -->
</div>
<!-- ── END ABOUT SECTION ── -->


<div class="toast" id="toast">✓ Copied to clipboard</div>
```
